description: Perform a two-way (factorial) ANOVA on the 'Tooth Growth' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv) to analyze the interaction between supplement type ('supp') and dosage ('dose') on tooth length ('len'). Ensure 'dose' is treated as a nominal or ordinal factor. The analysis must include the interaction term 'supp * dose', descriptive statistics, descriptive plots (with 'dose' on the horizontal axis and 'supp' as separate lines), Levene's homogeneity tests, and post-hoc tests for the interaction. Save the analysis results to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth_Factorial.jasp.
